ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the competitor */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the competitor belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the competitor belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the competitor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the competitor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the competitor registered with the federation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the competitor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event is held */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (sanctioned, exhibition, etc.) */,
  "stack_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stacking technique used in the competition */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens for the competition */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes for the competition */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the competition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the competition (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_stack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stack_type_id") REFERENCES stack_types ("stack_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor performing */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition where the performance took place */,
  "stack_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stacking technique used */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the stacking event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., sanctioned, exhibition) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the competitor in the specific performance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the performance, if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_stack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stack_type_id") REFERENCES stack_types ("stack_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the competition is held */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the competition is held */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the competition is held */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stack_types" (
  "stack_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stacking technique */,
  "stack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stacking technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technique */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the stacking technique (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., sanctioned, exhibition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_sanctioned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is officially sanctioned */,
  "points_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for points awarded in this type of event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the team */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the team (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group range */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the coach has */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the coach */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
